name: Phyllis' Avocado Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except the first three in a large bowl.
2. Mash the avocado and add the egg and sour milk. If the flour mixture is very dry, add another egg.
3. Combine the avocado mixture with the flour mixture, stirring only until all flour is moistened.
4. Pour the batter into a loaf pan or 4 mini loaf pans.
5. Bake the loaf at 350°F for 1 hour. Mini loaves require baking at 375°F for 25-30 minutes.
